reasoning: The control CC8.1 focuses on the authorization, design, development, configuration, documentation, testing, approval, and implementation of changes to infrastructure, data, software, and procedures. In Kubernetes, this can be mapped to ensuring that changes are properly managed and controlled through RBAC policies, admission controllers, and audit logging. RBAC can be used to define who can make changes, admission controllers can enforce policies around changes, and audit logs can track changes. NetworkPolicies can ensure that changes to network configurations are approved and documented.
title: CC8.1 The entity authorizes, designs, develops or acquires, configures, documents, tests, approves, and implements changes to infrastructure, data, software, and procedures to meet its objectives
